pr.title: Mark OS header with define for single include
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Small header hygiene PR intended to make include/dolphin/os/os.h safe for single inclusion by wrapping OSCalendarTime in an include guard. The diff adds a top-level #ifndef/#define pair and trailing #endif, and also fixes the missing final newline. Evidence is limited to the title and one-file diff; there were no PR body notes, comments, or reviews.
what_changed: Added an include guard around include/dolphin/os/os.h.
Kept the existing OSCalendarTime typedef unchanged.
Added a final newline after the OSCalendarTime typedef and before the closing #endif.
The diff shows '#ifndef _OS_H__' but '#define _OS_H_', which appears inconsistent; the PR context does not include discussion explaining whether this was intentional or a typo.
smart_moves: Targeted a minimal, isolated header-only fix touching only include/dolphin/os/os.h.
Preserved the existing struct layout and comments, avoiding ABI or matching risk while improving include hygiene.
Added the guard at the outermost scope, the reusable pattern for Dolphin SDK-style umbrella headers.
decomp_lessons: Even very small SDK header fixes matter because duplicate typedefs from repeated includes can break broader decompilation builds.
When adding include guards, verify that the macro checked by #ifndef exactly matches the macro defined by #define; this diff contains a visible mismatch between _OS_H__ and _OS_H_.
Header hygiene changes should avoid touching declarations unless needed, especially for SDK structs such as OSCalendarTime where layout stability matters.
naming_conventions: The intended guard macro style follows an uppercase, underscore-delimited SDK/header name pattern like _OS_H_.
The OS calendar time type remains named OSCalendarTime, matching Dolphin OS SDK naming.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or review records were present in the PR slice.
No reviewer rationale was available; observations are inferred only from the title and diff.
searchable_terms: Mark OS header with define for single include
follow_up_queries: Check later history of include/dolphin/os/os.h for a fix to the _OS_H__ versus _OS_H_ include guard mismatch.
Search for other Dolphin SDK headers using guard macro style _*_H_ to keep naming consistent.
Audit repeated includes of dolphin/os/os.h to confirm whether duplicate typedef issues motivated this change.
